zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Howland於1670年7月13日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯度波利時，他的父親Zoeth Howland34歲，母親Abigail Howland36歲。他於1697年10月26日與Hannah Woodman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1722年4月1日在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Howland于1670年7月13日出生在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯度波利时，他的父亲Zoeth Howland34岁，母亲Abigail Howland36岁。他于1697年10月26日与Hannah Woodman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1722年4月1日在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Howland was born on 13 July 1670, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Zoeth Howland, was 34 and his mother, Abigail Howland, was 36. He married Hannah Woodman on 26 October 1697, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 1 April 1722, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 51, and was buried in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Howland est né le 13 juillet 1670, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Zoeth Howland, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Abigail Howland, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Woodman le 26 octobre 1697, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1722, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Howland am 13. Juli 1670 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Zoeth Howland 34 und seine Mutter Abigail Howland 36. Er hat am 26. Oktober 1697 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America Hannah Woodman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1722 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Howland è nato il il 13 luglio 1670 nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Zoeth Howland, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Howland, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Woodman il 26 ottobre 1697, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1722, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Howlandが1670年7月13日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスダクスブリーで生まれた時，父Zoeth Howlandは34歳，母Abigail Howlandは36歳であった。1697年10月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでHannah Woodmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1722年4月1日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルダルトモウスで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스

ko.Duxbury, Massachusetts, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이

ko.Dartmouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Howland(이)가 1670년 7월 13일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Zoeth Howland(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Howland(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1697년 10월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Hannah Woodman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1722년 4월 1일 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Howland nasceu em 13 de julho de 1670, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Zoeth Howland, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Howland, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Woodman em 26 de outubro de 1697, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1722, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Howland родился 13 июля 1670 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Zoeth Howland было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Abigail Howland, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Woodman 26 октября 1697 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 1 апреля 1722 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Howland nació el 13 de julio de 1670, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Zoeth Howland, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Abigail Howland, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Hannah Woodman el 26 de octubre de 1697, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1722, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
